# Metanetsoft

> Technical consultancy focused on AI, web engineering, mobile applications, scalable architecture, and digital transformation.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://metanetsoft.com/) - Main overview of Metanetsoft services, portfolio references, and contact workflow.
- [Homepage in Turkish](https://metanetsoft.com/?locale=tr) - Turkish presentation of the main landing page.
- [Homepage in English](https://metanetsoft.com/?locale=en) - English presentation of the main landing page.

## Services

- AI and Intelligent Automation - Custom LLM fine-tuning, predictive logic engines, computer vision.
- Web Design, Engineering, and SEO - Modern UI/UX design, React and Next.js engineering, technical SEO and performance optimization.
- Mobile Application Development - Native and cross-platform mobile experiences, Swift and Kotlin expertise, real-time biometric synchronization.
- Cloud Infrastructure Scalability - Elastic architectures handling millions of requests per second.
- Enterprise Digital Transformation - End-to-end software ecosystem modernization.
